titleStmt.title: SII 5.879: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 879. (A.R. No. 16 of 1896). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripaṉmarāṉa tiribhu vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīparān=takade vaṟku yāṇṭu Oṉpa
tāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu melmalai paḻaiyanūṟnāṭṭu paḻaiyanūrāḷuṭai
yār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiyār koyilil dekṣi ṇāmūr ttide vaṟku Amāvāsi nāḷ Amutuceta
ruḷa coḻamaṇṭalattu kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭuc ceṟṟūṟkūṟṟattu Iṭaikkuṟumpūruṭai
yāṉ Araiyaṉ rājarājade vaṉeṉ naṭuvilmalaipa perumūrnāṭṭup poḷippākkattu
Ūrārpakkal nāṉ vilaiyiṭṭuk koṇṭa nilamāvatu meṟpaṭiyūrk kaṅkanerittūmpukku kiḻpā
ṟ kellai toḻukkaṭṭai maṭṭattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟ kellai Apputtalaikkuṇṭiliṉ vaṭava
rampukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai paḻaiyanū rellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai kaṅkanerit tūmpuniṉ
ṟuṅ kiḻakkunokkip pona kālukkut teṟkum Iṉṉāṟpā lellaikkum naṭavupaṭṭa taṭi Oṉṟum mikutik kuṟai
vakappaṭa kuḻi muṉṉuṟum koṇṭu Ittevaṟku viṭṭu niman=ta m paṇṇinapaṭiyāvatu tiruvamirta
rici kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻikku nellu mukkuṟuṇiaṟunāḻiyum kaṟiamutu muṉṟukku nellu Irunāḻiyum tayira
mutu nāḻikku nellu Irunāḻiyum Amutu ceytaruḷavum tiruviḷakku Iraṇṭukkum ney Uḻakkukkum ne
lluk kuṟuṇiyum pākku Añcukkum veṟṟilai patinañcukkum nellu nāḻi Uriyum tiruppaḷḷittāmam paṟippā
nukku nellu ṉāḻi Uriyum tirumeypūccukku nellu muṉṉāḻiyum Āka nellut tūṇippatakku muṉṉāḻiyu
m Amāvāsi toṟum Amirtuceytaruḷak kaṭavarāka dakṣi ṇāmuttikaḷukku Innilam yāṉ vilaiyiṭṭu koṇ
ṭa pra māṇattile tiriviṭṭukkuṭutteṉ Iraikkuṟumpūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ rājarājatevanenThe total is in excess by 3 nā0ḷi...
Digital edition of SII 5.879 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
